name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
steps: Marinate chicken with curd, ginger garlic paste, biryani masala, chilli powder, salt and half the mint for 1 hour.
Deep fry the sliced onions until deep golden and crisp.
Boil soaked basmati rice with whole spices and salt until 70 percent cooked, then drain.
Layer the marinated chicken, half-cooked rice, fried onions, mint and saffron milk in a heavy pot.
Seal and cook on dum: high heat for 5 minutes, then lowest flame for 25 minutes.
Rest 10 minutes, open, fluff gently and serve with raita and mirchi ka salan.
